errors.text: Its pretty good for right now, but not able to recomend for 1 reason. Content is very low.
This game is buggier than Star Citizen, and thats saying something! :D

I was an OBT1 player. In those days, the game was unplayable. I didn't return for OBT2, nor did I preorder the game.
On a whim, after hearing about the title updates, I figured I could afford to spend the money on it-- half off for the big pack, at the time. Let me tell you, I have zero regrets.

During the beta, the graphical issues, lag, and stuttering

Spoiled me now I don't want to play the first one. But the bugs are unbelievable and I can't use ships or airplanes because they don't connect. Traffic and pedestrian pathfinding decisions are terrible, or maybe its me...

BUT other than those two top bugs for me, it beats the first game. Not for weak computers however, my rtx 2060 from 2019 struggles at 3

35 EUR -> Not so bad for this game. yeah.. buy it. It's a total new feeling from Cities Skylines 1.
This game is actually not that bad.
But the early game is extremely confusing, and it’s very easy to get stuck if you don’t understand how the new systems work.

but the reason i even got a bit into it

microtransactions go brum brum

アイテムが設置できるにもかかわらず削除しようとすると「アイテムが重なっています」と表示されどうやっても削除できなくなりました。アクセスできないオブジェクトが残り続けることを意味すると思うのでそれまでかけた時間を無駄にされた気分です。（自動セーブでも戻せなくなって終わりました。）
まだ序盤だったので軽微で済んだと考えられなくもないですが、発展が進んだ段階でこういった不具合に当たってしまう可能性を考えるとプレイする気が削がれます。

上記を気にされる方は設定で自動セーブの数を増やしておくか、定期的に別データとしてセーブしておくことをおすすめします。（特定のMODを入れることでオブジェクトを強制的に削除できるようですが、バニラでは無理でした。）

ゲーム内容自体は前作から大きく変わっている印象はないです。購入を検討さ
